[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00001100 2
1 00100101 3
2 00000010 1
3 01101100 4
4 00100001 2
5 00000110 2
6 00100101 3
7 00000000 a

01 10 00001010 2
12 21 00000100 1
23 32 00000000 a match 7
34 43 00001000 1

56 65 00000101 2
67 76 00000101 2
70 07 00101001 3

13 31 00011010 3
24 42 00100100 2
35 53 00010000 1
46 64 00000100 1
57 75 01100101 4
60 06 10000011 3
71 17 00001100 2 match 0

03 30 00001010 2
14 41 00001100 2 match 0

36 63 00000010 1 match 2
47 74 01101100 4 match 3
50 05 00100001 2 match 4
61 16 00000110 2 match 5
72 27 00100101 3 match 1 6

04 40 00101000 2
15 51 00010100 2
26 62 10000101 3
37 73 00001000 1
